_meta.owner: Jillian / Person A owns the final expanded eval content.
_meta.format: Use expected_status when every requested channel should return the same compliance_status. Use expected_by_channel for mixed multi-channel expectations.
_meta.notes: Seed cases are scaffold examples grounded in the current deterministic compliance dictionary; review/expand before using pass rate as a demo metric.

Say it repairs your barrier overnight and makes skin eczema-free.
